hero.title: Adding Character to Spaces, Value to Living
hero.subtitle: From residential to commercial and urban projects, we bring your dream space to life with a modern, premium and natural design approach — delivered turnkey.

home.featuredSubtitle: A selection of spaces we designed
home.servicesSubtitle: From concept to turnkey delivery, all design processes under one roof
home.ctaText: Book a free discovery appointment to talk about your dream space. We serve Mersin and the surrounding region.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Bulut Design — an interior architecture and design studio based in Mersin
about.story1: Bulut Design is a design studio operating in interior architecture and architectural design in Mersin. Led by our founder Lokman Bulut, we create solutions that combine aesthetics and functionality in residential, commercial, urban design and interior projects.
about.story2: We start every project by understanding the spirit of the space and the lifestyle of its user. We blend modern lines with natural materials and classic elegance with premium details, designing spaces of lasting value throughout the region — especially Mersin, Yenişehir, Tarsus, Erdemli and Silifke.
about.story3: Throughout our turnkey process from design to implementation, transparency, on-time delivery and craftsmanship quality are our priorities.
about.visionText: To become a design studio that shapes the design culture of the Mediterranean, is recognized nationwide, and makes a difference with the unique identity it brings to its work.
about.missionText: To transform our clients' dreams into functional, aesthetic and sustainable spaces — offering accessible premium design at every budget, through an honest and transparent process.
about.process1Text: We examine the space on site and listen to your needs and expectations.
about.process2Text: We present a concept tailored to your lifestyle with 3D visuals.
about.process3Text: We finalize implementation drawings, materials and budget planning.
about.process4Text: We manage the entire process end-to-end and deliver your space turnkey.
